values: Trekker may struggle to keep pace with the team if unfit, slowing the group
Missing out on the deep, transformative experience Indiahikes designs for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you’re slow.
You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.

values: Walk, jog or run 10 km in under 60 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)
Cardiovascular endurance and muscle strength are the two areas to work on

Strength training includes 60 standard pushups (or alternatives: 4x25=100 knee pushups or 4x50=200 wall pushups), 80 full squats (or 4x40=160 half squats), jumping lunges (or forward lunges), and planks (split into halves if needed)

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Kanamo Peak Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 10 km in under 60 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
To reach any fitness target, there are two things you must work on: Cardiovascular endurance; Muscle strength

Alternatives to 60 Standard Pushups = (4 x 25 = 100 knee pushups) = (4 x 50 = 200 wall pushups); Alternative to 80 full squats = (4 x 40 = 160 half squats); Alternative to jumping lunges = forward lunges (same count)

values: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team; without it you will not be allowed on the trek
Only running, jogging or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training workouts will not be considered valid
Record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month that meet the fitness criteria
Use apps like Nike Run Club or Strava to log runs; paste a public profile link on your Indiahikes account
Fitness record may be rejected if you fail to link your fitness profile or do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
make sure to record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month to meet the fitness criteria of the trek.

Use fitness tracking apps such as Strava, Nike Run Club, or similar to log your runs and workouts. Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public). Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.
If you fail to link your fitness profile; If you do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

values: 6-week plan to get trek-fit if not currently active
Start the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks!
All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records; parents must ensure children remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.
